title: Minky Retractable Reel Washing Line with 15 m of Drying Space, Extendable Clothes Line for Laundry, Wall Mounted for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Grey, Single Line
features: Easy to use retractable outdoor washing line
Stows neatly away when not in use
Fully retractable with UV stable protective casing
Clips off bracket for winter storage
description: From the manufacturer Minky Homecare Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are one of the world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as a supplier of high quality products to the Royal Household and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product quality and a commitment to the environment. Minky Retractable Reel Washing Line The Minky 15m Retractable Reel has a very sturdy retractable washing line to provide up to 15m of drying space. It attaches to the wall with a special bracket, so you can remove the reel when not in use. The PVC coated lines are easy to wipe clean. For homes without the space for a conventional rotary this Retractable Reel is ideal for small gardens patios and balconies and gives 15m of drying space. The product features an easy to use retractable outdoor washing line and it stows neatly away when not in use. The protective casing is UV stable and the special bracket means the whole product can be removed when not in use. Features and Benefits 15m Retractable Line Featuring one sturdy 15m adjustable line with a secure clip to affix line when extended. Up to 15kg Load The strong line can hold up to 15kg of garments when damp. Large Capacity 15m of drying space allows for more than one large standard machine wash load worth of garments to be dried at any time. Clip-off Bracket The Minky retractable lines features a quick release clip-off bracket for winter storage.
